top_findings.title: POST /books — Create a new book
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:26-31 implements POST endpoint; src/books/db.clj:20-28 implements create-book!

top_findings.title: GET /books — List all books with author filter
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:33-36 implements GET /books with author parameter; src/books/db.clj:30-39 implements list-books with optional author filter

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} — Get single book by ID
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:38-41 implements GET /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:41-44 implements get-book function

top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} — Update a book
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:43-51 implements PUT /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:46-50 implements update-book! function

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/{id} — Delete a book
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:53-56 implements DELETE /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:52-57 implements delete-book! function
